Package org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.autoconfigure.flatfile

package org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.autoconfigure.flatfile
Auto-configuration classes for flat file item readers and writers in single-step batch jobs.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.autoconfigure
    Auto-configuration classes for Spring Cloud Task single-step batch jobs.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.autoconfigure.jdbc
    Auto-configuration classes for JDBC item readers and writers in single-step batch jobs.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.autoconfigure.kafka
    Auto-configuration classes for Kafka item readers and writers in single-step batch jobs.
    org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.autoconfigure.rabbit
    Auto-configuration classes for RabbitMQ item readers and writers in single-step batch jobs.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    FlatFileItemReaderAutoConfiguration
    Autconfiguration for a FlatFileItemReader.
    FlatFileItemReaderAutoConfiguration.MapFieldSetMapper
    A FieldSetMapper that takes a FieldSet and returns the Map<String, Object> of its contents.
    FlatFileItemReaderProperties
    Properties to configure a FlatFileItemReader.
    FlatFileItemWriterAutoConfiguration
    Autoconfiguration for a FlatFileItemWriter.
    FlatFileItemWriterAutoConfiguration.MapFieldExtractor
    A FieldExtractor that converts a Map<String, Object> to the ordered Object[] required to populate an output record.
    FlatFileItemWriterProperties
    Properties for configuring a FlatFileItemWriter.
